hypothesis: Separating FF from FB in QP lets MPC focus on residual error only
root_cause_detail: MPC already discovers feedforward within 2 frames; decomposition doesn't help because the bottleneck is L_model=2.5 vs L_eff=3.65

hypothesis: Lower q_lat at step 0 reduces oscillation, allowing higher base q_lat
root_cause_detail: Stability boundary (q_lat≈2.5) is whole-horizon model-plant mismatch, not step-0 aggressiveness

hypothesis: Full tire model eliminates kinematic model-plant mismatch
root_cause_detail: CFL stability floor forces v_safe=6.2 m/s when actual=3.9 m/s on s_loop curves, creating worse mismatch than kinematic model

hypothesis: More aggressive lateral tracking weight reduces steady-state error
root_cause_detail: q_lat > 2.5 oscillates due to model-plant mismatch amplification; higher gain amplifies the 46% understeer bias

hypothesis: Matching L_model to L_eff eliminates understeer bias
root_cause_detail: Curve error is transient (entry ramp), not steady-state. Fixing L helps steady-state but transient entry with rate penalty dominates

hypothesis: Less rate penalty allows faster curve entry steering ramp
root_cause_detail: Rate penalty is load-bearing for stability — reducing it with model-plant mismatch present causes oscillation
